data.title: Fed Governor Michelle Bowman set for the crypto and industry committee
data.description:
The US Senate Banking Committee will conduct a confirmation hearing next Thursday, where it will question Federal Reserve Governor Michelle Bowman on her nomination to become the central bank’s new Vice Chair for Supervision. Bowman, tapped by President Donald Trump earlier this week, would take over the role vacated by Michael Barr, who resigned in […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/michelle-bowman-set-for-the-crypto-industry/

data.title: FIL rose 10.3% in a short period of time, reaching a high of $3.4
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to OKX market data, FIL rose 10.3% in a short period of time, possibly due to the fact that Upbit will launch FIL Korean won trading pairs, and is now quoted at US$2.93, with a maximum increase of US$3.4.
Previous news, Upbit will launch FIL in the Korean won market.
